---
title: "Courses"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Redirecting to Academy/Courses"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex">
---

```{=html}
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=/academy/courses/">
<script>window.location.href = "/academy/courses/";</script>
```

If you are not redirected automatically, please [click here](/academy/courses/) to access the Courses section.
